category_sources: Official Streamripper homepage says it records streaming MP3 to disk, and SourceForge categorizes it as audio recording.
source_facts.description says Streamripper separates tracks via Shoutcast title streaming.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and SourceForge project page use the name Streamripper.
docs_sources: Official homepage has Documentation links for console tutorial, FAQ, how it works, and CVS access.
source_facts.homepage is the official Streamripper site.
repo_sources: Confidence is medium because the project uses legacy CVS hosting and the browsable repository URL is historical SourceForge infrastructure.
Official Streamripper CVS page states the CVS repository is at streamripper.cvs.sourceforge.net:/cvsroot/streamripper and links to a browsable CVS repository.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge page says Streamripper records shoutcast-compatible streams and separates tracks using stream metadata.
source_facts.description identifies Shoutcast title-stream track separation.
